name: Weaver Leather Texas Star Horse Browband Headstall
description: Your horse will be the true star when wearing the Weaver Leather Texas Star Horse Browband Headstall.  With style that’s straight out of Texas, this headstall features nickel-plated zinc die cast Texas star conchos sporting 18-karat-gold-plated stars guaranteed to make a big impression. Nickel brass spots also frame the headstall and browband, paired beautifully with durable non-rust stainless-steel  buckles. Crafted from doubled and stitched 5/8-inch premium English bridle leather, this headstall combines eye-catching style with a durable performance.
